meaning: adj.无(传动)齿轮的 无传动装置的
examples: Manufacturers are moving toward gearless turbines, however, so that limitation may become moot.
ABB's delivery includes six complete gearless mill drive systems: two 22 megawatt (MW) systems and four 14 MW systems.
This paper introduces control of motors by using frequency-transformer, which changes two kinds of speed(faster and slower) into gearless speed regulation.
